status: exact geometric latent-reentry obstruction under the pinned height-two fixed-word policy; not a reachable-history theorem

semantic_repeat.normalization: delete elapsed_seconds and maximum_resident_set_raw, then encode sorted compact JSON

infinite_integer_line_family.definition: h=(55,34,18), g_n=N^(2n)h, L_n={x:x cross g_n=p cross g_n}
infinite_integer_line_family.primitive: h_y is nonzero modulo 3; N preserves that fact and is invertible modulo every other prime
infinite_integer_line_family.integer_moment: g_n modulo 22 has exact period five and P cross g_n is zero modulo 22 for P=22p=(-99,-78,-62)
infinite_integer_line_family.integer_line_criterion: for primitive g, the map x -> x cross g has saturated image in the integer plane orthogonal to g

all_n_zero_mask_and_reentry.phase_adjustment: step-8 candidate x is tested directly; step-16 candidate x is pulled back to (-4,-4,-3)+M^(-1)x
all_n_zero_mask_and_reentry.exclusion: the first is g_0; the second has primitive x-coordinate 165, which is not 55*9^n for any integer n>=1
all_n_zero_mask_and_reentry.theorem: for every n>=1, L_n has empty full candidate-site masks through n complete phase-cycle traversals, then returns as L_0 and hits selected step-8 interior (-2,-2,-2)

exact_consequence: The direct carried-line right congruence over all integer lattice lines has infinite index even under these common-potential-compatible fixed actions. The height-two potential ranks continuously effectful candidate-to-candidate chains only; it says nothing about an arbitrarily long zero-mask interval. Calling these lines reachable secants additionally requires two placed endpoints, which this certificate does not prove.

smallest_sound_direct_state.state: current correlated cursor plus the exact centered primitive Pluecker pair (g,m); a current candidate mask or potential value is derived data and is not a transition-sufficient replacement
smallest_sound_direct_state.ancestral_transition: g'=canon(Mg), m'=canonically scaled C(m-c cross g)
smallest_sound_direct_state.latent_reentry: a future candidate y is a hit exactly when its rational pullback ghost lies on the retained line

not_proved: that any L_n is born as a secant in a reachable globally legal ordered-path history
that this phase cycle repeats in the reachable safety-game subgraph after all other poison channels are imposed
failure of a finite quotient after unreachable births are removed or the action filter is strengthened to break this cycle
control of endpoint, near-deep, deep-deep, collision, or unrelated same-level cursor-jump channels
an unconditional far-secant lemma or Erdős #193 theorem
